aboutPreview.title: Who we are
aboutPreview.text: We are a construction company from Brno specialising in renovations of flats, houses and commercial spaces. Since 2010 we have focused on quality workmanship, meeting deadlines and fair dealing.

story.label: Our story
story.title: Quality and reliability since 2010
story.text1: The company was founded in 2010 and from day one has specialised in quality renovations, refurbishments and construction works. Over the years we have earned the trust of dozens of clients across the Czech Republic.
story.text2: We care that every structure we build — whether a family home, an office or a public building — serves its owners well for years to come. Into every project we put all our experience, attention to detail and full professional responsibility.

values.title: Our values
values.subtitle: What defines us
values.qualityDesc: We use only certified materials and proven procedures.
values.reliabilityDesc: We meet deadlines and the agreed budget.
values.transparencyDesc: Clear communication and fair pricing with no hidden fees.

quote.label: Our philosophy
quote.text: Every project we take on, we treat as our own. I care that the client is satisfied — not just at handover, but ten years down the line. Whether we build or renovate, we always work with full responsibility.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Get in touch
contact.focus: Focus: Construction works, complete renovations, turnkey buildings, facade insulation and installation of pools or fireplaces.

form.name: Full name
form.success: Message sent. We will get back to you soon!
form.error: Failed to send message. Please try again.

controller.title: Data controller
controller.text: The data controller is E-Tek Group s.r.o., Registration No.: 29221463, registered address Příkop 838/6, 602 00 Brno, Czech Republic. Email: etekbajer@gmail.com.

data.title: What data we process
data.text: We process only the data you provide via the contact form: your name, email address and the text of your enquiry. Phone number is optional. We do not perform any tracking or visitor analytics.

purpose.title: Purpose of processing
purpose.text: We use your data solely to respond to your enquiry or request. We do not send unsolicited commercial messages.

retention.title: Data retention
retention.text: We retain personal data for as long as necessary to resolve your enquiry, for a maximum of 1 year from last contact.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.text: You have the right to access, correct, delete (right to be forgotten) or restrict the processing of your data. Simply write to us at our email address.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.text: This website does not use analytics or marketing cookies. Technically necessary cookies required for website functionality (e.g. language settings) are used on the basis of legitimate interest.

contact.title: Data protection contact
contact.text: If you have any questions regarding the processing of your personal data, please contact us at: etekbajer@gmail.com or in writing at Příkop 838/6, 602 00 Brno, Czech Republic.

cookieBanner.text: We use cookies on our website to find out how you interact with it. By clicking Accept, you express your consent to this use.

footer.tagline: Construction company in the Czech Republic since {year}.

home.title: ETEK Stavby | Construction Company Brno, Czech Republic
home.description: Professional construction services, renovations and residential building in Brno and South Moravia, Czech Republic. Contact us today.

about.title: About Us | ETEK Stavby Brno
about.description: Meet the ETEK Stavby team – a construction company with tradition since 2010. Quality, reliability and transparency on every project in Brno.

projects.title: Our Projects | ETEK Stavby Brno
projects.description: Portfolio of completed projects – family houses, apartment renovations, commercial and industrial construction in Brno and South Moravia.

certificates.title: Certificates | ETEK Stavby
certificates.description: ETEK Stavby's professional certificates confirm the highest quality standards in construction.

contact.title: Contact | ETEK Stavby Brno
contact.description: Contact ETEK Stavby for a free consultation. We build in Brno and South Moravia. Tel: +420 777 334 401.
